---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for RediculousCoding
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. "I wish there was a way to..."

## Describe the solution you'd like
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Which area does this relate to?
- [ ] Visual effects (blips, booms, fireworks, screen shake)
- [ ] Audio (typing sounds, deletion sounds, level-up fanfare)
- [ ] XP & leveling system
- [ ] Settings / configuration
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Control panel (sidebar)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Describe alternatives you've considered
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
